item.title: Teen Girl Who Never Came Home From Work: Katie's Story
item.description: This video shares Katie’s story, outlining the timeline, known details, and the ongoing effort to understand what happened after she left work.

item.title: The Insane Couple Who Bragged On Social Media

item.title: Home Invasion or Husband from Hell? : The Morgan Metzer Case
item.description: This video examines the Morgan Metzer case, exploring whether the incident was a home invasion or something closer to home, along with the investigation and key evidence.

item.title: There's Something So Off About This Case
item.description: Explore a mysterious and unsettling case where details don’t add up, reviewing the investigation, key facts, and lingering questions that make it so perplexing.
